# Reports directory
# Generated by the training & evaluation pipelines:
#   - test_metrics.json / .txt      — AUROC, Brier, F1, top-decile lift
#   - test_roc_curve.png            — ROC curve plot
#   - test_calibration_curve.png    — Probability calibration plot
#   - scored_customers.csv          — Batch scored output file
#   - logs/pipeline.log             — Rotating log file
